# RawHost

> Offshore bulletproof VPS hosting based in Slovenia. Zero logs, DMCA-ignored, anonymous crypto payments (BTC, XMR, USDT). Enterprise-grade network with 1 Gbps uplink included in all plans.

## Services

- [VPS Plans](https://rawhost.net/#pricing): Offshore virtual private servers — Basic (Linux) and Premium (Windows/Linux) tiers, hourly or monthly billing.
- [Proxies](https://proxy.rawhost.net): High-quality residential and datacenter proxies.

## Pages

- [Home](https://rawhost.net/): Landing page with plans, features and network specs.
- [Register](https://rawhost.net/register): Create an account to order a VPS.
- [Login](https://rawhost.net/login): Access the client dashboard.
- [Terms of Service](https://rawhost.net/terms): Acceptable use policy and service terms.

## Contact

- Telegram: [@rawhost](https://t.me/rawhost)
